description: Data-analysis subagent (data-profiler) — EDA, data profiling, outlier detection, infectious-disease/stock data framing.

cases.prompt: A CSV has 12 columns; the 'age' column is 30% missing. Propose a profiling plan and 3 imputation options with trade-offs.
A salary column has a max of 50,000,000 while the 99th percentile is 500,000. How do you detect and handle this outlier?
Profile a column that looks numeric but has values like '12,345' and 'N/A'. What's wrong and how do you clean it?
Two columns 'ad_spend' and 'sales' have Pearson r=0.85. Interpret this and state one common misinterpretation.
A 'transaction_amount' column is heavily right-skewed. Propose a transformation for visualization and modeling.
A customer table has 10,000 rows but 9,500 unique emails. Walk through a dedup strategy.
A daily disease-case count series rises sharply on Mondays. Is this signal or artifact? How do you check?
Compute and interpret the annualized volatility of a stock given daily returns. Which window size and why?
A 'city' column has 2,000 unique values in a 10,000-row dataset. How do you handle high-cardinality categoricals for modeling?
Draft the structure of a one-page data quality report for a stakeholder who isn't technical.
